title: Spaces excluded from FSI and Coverage Computation
excluded_items: Terrace stair/lift rooms & passages, architectural features, elevated tanks, WC <=10 sqm
Stair/lift rooms & passages in stilt parking floor or upper floors used for parking
Stair/lift rooms & passages in basement floor(s) used for parking
Stilt parking floor if open on sides and used for parking
Servant/driver bath & WC per block (GF or stilt) for NHR & HR buildings
Caretaker booth/room in ground or stilt parking floor
engine_note: Applied as an informational uplift: built-up usable area can exceed counted-FSI area because these are excluded. Not auto-quantified yet (depends on design).
